CHECKLIST / MODULE 8 / LESSON 6: JV WEBINAR
JV WEBINAR CHECKLIST
There are 5 steps to a successful JV webinar:
1. 	Attract JV Partners
JV partnerships are a relationship business, supported by your numbers.
You’re asking this potential partner to risk their relationship with their email
list to support you, so it helps to create a relationship of trust.
Once you've developed a trusting relationship, you need to make a case as to
why this is a good thing for them to consider. You do that with your numbers.
For example, you can say, “This webinar can be very profitable for you. The
data from my last 10 webinars shows that for every person you get to register,
I’ll send you $36.21.”
In other words, you want to wait until your webinar is converting well before
bringing on JV partners.
2. 	Find JV Partners
✓ 	Start with people you already know: Friends, people you’ve met at
conferences, people you know from social media, potential partners may
also be on your list “would you like to earn some extra income? If you have
a list of people who may be interested in a webinar about ______, let’s talk”
✓ 	Then start prospecting: Find people who have lists of the sort of prospects
you want to attend your webinar. This could be people who have products
your prospects would buy, have blogs they would read, have podcasts they
would listen to or who have social media followings they might be
interested in.
✓ 	Go to conferences and trainings that potential partners might attend
✓ 	Don’t be afraid to ask “competitors” to promote your webinar - often they
are the best affiliates (there is no such thing as a competitor… only
potential partners)
3. 	Use Bonuses In The Promotion
✓ 	Have your host (JV partner) offer an extra bonus to everyone who buys.
This will show support of your product and become a recommendation
that they should buy (see M4 L4 (Introducing Your Webinar) for how to
have your JV be a host on your webinar))

CHECKLIST / MODULE 8 / LESSON 6: JV WEBINAR
✓ 	How to announce it on the webinar:
✓ 	During the webinar, this can be announced where it best fits (if unsure,
suggest after you finish making the offer, before you start answering
questions)
✓ 	Have them prepare a couple of slides pitching their bonus and share
their screen so people can see them
✓ 	Have the host come on the air and say, “I’m a huge support of [your
name] and the work he/she is doing. And I recommend you buy this
product. In fact, I feel so strongly about that, that I’m going to offer a
special bonus to everyone who buys it from this webinar.” (The host
then describes the bonus)
✓ 	Acknowledge, praise and thank them for this generous bonus
✓ 	Reiterate that they’re giving this bonus because they believe you
should buy
✓ 	Clarify that this bonus applies to anyone who buys before the Cart
Close date
✓ 	Make it clear their offer is now part of your offer
✓ 	From then on in the webinar, every time you refer to your bonus,
include theirs in the list too
✓ 	Include the bonus in the emails that go out to their list
4. 	Use The Leaderboard Strategy
A leaderboard is a list of JV’s who bringing in the most prospects (sign ups)
and the most sales). This is a great way to incentivize your JV partners.
As a way to attract a potential JV, become an affiliate for them and try to get
on their leaderboard. There’s no faster way to get someone’s attention than to
get onto their leaderboard...
✓ 	Sign up to promote a product to your market
✓ 	Promote their product to your list
✓ 	Give away an amazing bonus
✓ 	(Look for leaderboard emails - those are all potential JV partners for you)
✓ 	Contact them after the launch/webinar and invite them to be a JV for you
✓ 	Share who else you’ve partnered with (social proof)
✓ 	Share the commissions you’ve paid (but don’t connect the two - for
privacy reasons)

CHECKLIST / MODULE 8 / LESSON 6: JV WEBINAR
5. 	Treat Your JV’s Well
Once you have JV partners, you need to take very good care of them:
✓ 	A letter of agreement outlining the arrangement
✓ 	Give them everything they need to promote for you (swipe copy, affiliate
link, daily updates, etc.)
✓ 	Create a separate email campaign and pages for each JV partner so that
you can talk about them in the promotional sequences
✓ 	Send them a list of people who bought via their offer so they can fulfill on
their bonuses
✓ 	Pay them on time
